form.formComment: Half-brother to dual-Group 3 winner Panova. Resuming after a break; only one run when 2nd in a small field at Gold Coast 2yo C&G-Swp on January 10 over 1100m, slow going 4.5 len behind Itchintogo carrying 56kg at $5. In the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Half-brother to dual-Group 3 winner Panova. Resuming after a break; only one run when 2nd in a small field at Gold Coast 2yo C&G-Swp on January 10 over 1100m, slow going 4.5 len behind Itchintogo carrying 56kg at $5. In the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Laid out over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, fourth in a small field at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on April 4 over 1300m, slow going 1.5 len behind Silken Salute carrying 57.5kg at $3. Promising two-year-old gelding who can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Was well-supported at debut, fourth in a small field at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on April 4 over 1300m, slow going 1.5 len behind Silken Salute carrying 57.5kg at $3. Promising two-year-old gelding who can take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and lost ground. Raced keenly approaching the 800m.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding making debut by Hellbent out of Excessabeel. Half-brother to two-time winner She Mogul. Dam was a winner of six races. Was third in a Doomben barrier trial over 840m on March 17. Expected to run well with the blinkers on.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old gelding making debut by Hellbent out of Excessabeel. Half-brother to two-time winner She Mogul. Dam was a winner of six races. Was third in a Doomben barrier trial over 840m on March 17. Expected to run well with the blinkers on.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Eagle Farm in the G3 Bj Mclachlan December 27 over 1200m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Zip Lock with 57kg at $41. On debut fourth of 10 at this track in the LR Phelan Ready December 6 over 1110m, 2.25 len behind Itchintogo carrying 57kg at $31. Looks all set for a positive return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Eagle Farm in the G3 Bj Mclachlan December 27 over 1200m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Zip Lock with 57kg at $41. On debut fourth of 10 at this track in the LR Phelan Ready December 6 over 1110m, 2.25 len behind Itchintogo carrying 57kg at $31. Looks all set for a positive return.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd in a small field at Gold Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw on December 13 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Ever So Ready carrying 58kg at $3.20. Can run a race while fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd in a small field at Gold Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw on December 13 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Ever So Ready carrying 58kg at $3.20. Can run a race while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped with Nozomu at the start. Laid out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: First starter. Two-year-old gelding by Aclaim out of Divine Ascot. Half-brother to three-start maiden Mystic Ascot. Dam was a winner of three races. At the most recent trial finished fifth on December 30 at Warwick over 800m. Favouring others until he proves himself.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter. Two-year-old gelding by Aclaim out of Divine Ascot. Half-brother to three-start maiden Mystic Ascot. Dam was a winner of three races. At the most recent trial finished fifth on December 30 at Warwick over 800m. Favouring others until he proves himself.

form.formComment: Filly by Encryption on debut. Full-sister to six-start maiden Encrypted Feeling. Dam was a winner of three races. Ran 3rd in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track over 1000m on March 31. Breaks from a low barrier draw but won't find this an easy assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Encryption on debut. Full-sister to six-start maiden Encrypted Feeling. Dam was a winner of three races. Ran 3rd in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track over 1000m on March 31. Breaks from a low barrier draw but won't find this an easy assignment.

form.formComment: First starter by Pierata out of Not A Princess purchased for AUD $25,000 (Inglis 2025 Classic Yearling Sale). Half-sister to winner Don't Cha Wish. Dam was a winner of two races. Only trial was March 19 at Beaudesert when third over 900m. Tough assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Pierata out of Not A Princess purchased for AUD $25,000 (Inglis 2025 Classic Yearling Sale). Half-sister to winner Don't Cha Wish. Dam was a winner of two races. Only trial was March 19 at Beaudesert when third over 900m. Tough assignment.

form.formComment: Filly by North Pacific making her first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track on March 31 over 1000m. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by North Pacific making her first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track on March 31 over 1000m. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: At debut, 6th of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn on April 6 over 800m, 4.5 len behind Lucky Pat carrying 57kg at $8.50. Others rate better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). At debut, 6th of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn on April 6 over 800m, 4.5 len behind Lucky Pat carrying 57kg at $8.50. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Filly by Saxon Warrior on debut. Full-sister to six-time winner and Group 1 performed Shy Guy. Trial form indicates she's up to a solid debut. Won trial at Doomben over 840m on March 17. Looks a capable type and will be competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Saxon Warrior on debut. Full-sister to six-time winner and Group 1 performed Shy Guy. Trial form indicates she's up to a solid debut. Won trial at Doomben over 840m on March 17. Looks a capable type and will be competitive.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Spirit Of Boom out of Gullfoss. Dam was a winner of one race. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 840m at Doomben March 17. Others are preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Spirit Of Boom out of Gullfoss. Dam was a winner of one race. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 840m at Doomben March 17. Others are preferred.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th in a small field at Toowoomba 2yo SW on March 27 over 1200m, 3 len behind Apostle with 55kg at $10. Maybe a place.
